title: Add 2 completed tasks i did today. i fixed the config but…

messages.content: Add 2 completed tasks i did today. i fixed the config button in second brain for non logged in users and for the second tasks i was planning to add markitdown for it to allow html, pdf etc. as welklk but as it is node js i abandoned that.

Let me quickly search for any existing related nodes before writing.Got the context. I'll now create both completed task nodes for today, linked to the existing second brain journal.Done! Two completed tasks saved for today (2026-06-25):

1. ✅ **Fix config button for non-logged-in users** — Bug fix shipped; the config button in Second Brain now works correctly when no user is logged in.

2. ~~✅~~ **Investigate markitdown integration (abandoned)** — Explored adding markitdown for HTML/PDF/DOCX ingestion, but abandoned it because markitdown is a Python library and Second Brain is Node.js. Noted a potential future approach of a Python sidecar if ever revisited.

Both are linked to your existing Second Brain improvements journal.

segments.text:
Done! Two completed tasks saved for today (2026-06-25):

1. ✅ **Fix config button for non-logged-in users** — Bug fix shipped; the config button in Second Brain now works correctly when no user is logged in.

2. ~~✅~~ **Investigate markitdown integration (abandoned)** — Explored adding markitdown for HTML/PDF/DOCX ingestion, but abandoned it because markitdown is a Python library and Second Brain is Node.js. Noted a potential future approach of a Python sidecar if ever revisited.

Both are linked to your existing Second Brain improvements journal.
